stories.headline: PM Modi secures nearly $40 billion in investments from five-nation tour

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: You know how much investment PM Modi secured during his recent 5-country visit? -Answer: Approx. $40 billion. Sadly, nobody is talking about it. People are rather mocking him...

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 🚨 BREAKING NEWS PM Modi’s recent five-nation tour helped India secure an investment pipeline worth nearly $40 BILLION.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Met President Sergio Mattarella in Rome. We discussed different aspects relating to the India-Italy friendship, including trade, investment and cultural linkages.

stories.headline: Iran and Oman discuss toll system for Strait of Hormuz

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Iran’s new definition of “managing” the Strait of Hormuz effectively extends its claimed regulatory zone into parts of UAE and Omani waters. This will not go well.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: ⚡️JUST IN: Iran and Oman are seriously discussing setting up a Permanent Toll System for the Strait of Hormuz

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Breaking News: Iran and Oman are in talks over a payment system for ships crossing the Strait of Hormuz, despite warnings from the Trump administration.

stories.headline: House Republicans cancel vote on resolution to limit Trump’s Iran military actions after lacking votes

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Breaking News: House Republicans abruptly canceled a vote on a resolution directing President Trump to withdraw U.S. forces from Iran or win approval from Congress to continue the war, after it became clear they lacked the votes to defeat the measure.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Republicans knew the War Powers Resolution to rein in Trump’s Iran War was about to pass—so they pulled the bill off the floor. When they can’t win, they hide. Vote them out.

stories.headline: House advances Sunshine Protection Act to make daylight saving time permanent

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: 🚨 JUST IN: President Trump announces legislation has ADVANCED to make PERMANENT Daylight Saving Time through the Sunshine Protection Act — and demands Congress make it LAW 🔥

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: JUST IN: House committee votes 48-1 to advance the “Sunshine Protection Act,” which would make daylight saving time permanent.

stories.headline: SGA leads Thunder to even series 1-1 in West Finals
stories.body:
SGA (30p, 9a in Game 2) led a balanced OKC attack to even the series, marking the first time the WCF are tied 1-1 since GSW/HOU in '18.

As the series shifts to San Antonio, both teams seek a 2-1 lead in the NBA Conference Finals presented by @Google at 8:30pm/et on NBC/Peacock!

stories.headline: Kenya-South Korea partnership advances science, technology, innovation and research collaboration
stories.body:
Our partnership is anchored on mutual benefit and tangible outcomes, reflecting the enduring fruits of bilateral engagement between Kenya and South Korea. Through collaboration in science, technology, innovation, research, and human capital development, the two nations continue to strengthen ties that deliver meaningful impact to society and economic transformation.

@Kenya_aist provides a strategic platform to deepen and expand this partnership by fostering joint research, academic exchange, technology transfer, industrial collaboration, and the development of world-class talent that will drive sustainable development.

stories.headline: Orange County Fire Authority announces press conference for Garden Grove hazardous materials incident.
stories.body:
Press conference announcement – Garden Grove hazardous materials incident

The Orange County Fire Authority, Garden Grove Police Department, and elected officials will hold a press conference at 2 p.m. at the Los Alamitos Race Track. A PIO will be on scene to direct media.

stories.headline: Thousands of Orange County residents under evacuation after toxic tank leak
stories.body: #BreakingNews: Thousands of Orange County residents are once again under evacuation orders Friday morning after a massive storage tank leak at an aerospace facility in Garden Grove continued to raise concerns overnight. https://ktla.com/news/local-news/thousands-evacuated-again-after-toxic-tank-leak-in-garden-grove/

stories.headline: U.S. Department of War shares link to second UFO document release
Post claims Senate GOP opposes Trump’s fund due to Deep State ties
stories.body: The reason John Thune and his corrupt friends are against Trump’s Anti-Weaponization fund is b/c they work for the Deep State. They don’t want Voter ID saving America from their rigged elections and they don’t want money being paid to the victims they abused with a weaponized DOJ. It would expose the Deep State’s guilt.

stories.headline: Post praises Tulsi Gabbard for fighting Deep State conspiracies
stories.body: DNI Gabbard has been one of the best warriors in Trump’s administration. She’s been leading the grand conspiracy case against the Deep State, from Russiagate, to election fraud, to Covid, to US biolabs, etc. Anyone claiming Tulsi is anything other than a Patriot, is an idiot.
